summary: Frontend testing of /exclusive-mentorships polish. 13 of 13 high-level checks executed. 11 PASS, 2 FAIL. Admin login, session, inline-editor (62 editable IDs), emotion-chip spotlight cycling, cosmic background, liquid particles, Spline mix-blend-mode, GalaxyBackground canvas (no shader errors), pull-quote cleanup, and mobile/tablet all working. Two failures: missing data-testid on eyebrows, and ExplodeText textContent missing spaces.

ui_bugs.issue: textContent is 'Stopwatching.Startearning.' (no spaces). Spacer span between word groups has aria-hidden empty body — visually it has width:0.32em so words look spaced, but textContent (and innerText, screen-readers, copy-paste) collapse to one string. Test spec requires textContent === 'Stop watching. Start earning.'

data-testid='whats-included-eyebrow' and data-testid='whats-included-eyebrow-se' are NOT present on the rendered nodes. Elements only have id='ment.refund.included.eyebrow' / 'ment.se.included.eyebrow'. EditableText component does not forward data-testid prop. Class .gradient-eyebrow IS applied, computed style would pass the bg-clip:text + transparent color check — couldn't verify because the testid-based selector returns null.

issues: 'Multiple instances of Three.js being imported' — Spline runtime + GalaxyBackground each pull their own three. Not blocking but could bloat bundle and cause subtle inconsistencies.

action_items: Fix ExplodeText.tsx spacer (~line 104-114): replace empty <span aria-hidden /> with a span that contains a literal space character so textContent/innerText include the gap. Keep letterSpacing:0 + display:inline-block to prevent the editorial-display -0.045em letter-spacing from collapsing it. Suggested patch: render { ' ' } inside the spacer span and remove aria-hidden, OR keep aria-hidden + add a visually-hidden sibling text node containing a space.

Add data-testid='whats-included-eyebrow' to the Refund eyebrow EditableText at /app/app/exclusive-mentorships/page.tsx ~line 392-397, and data-testid='whats-included-eyebrow-se' to the SE eyebrow EditableText at ~line 587-592. Likely requires extending EditableText props to forward `data-testid` to its rendered element (or wrap them in a <span data-testid=…>).
Optional: dedupe three.js — pin a single version and configure webpack alias so Spline runtime + GalaxyBackground share one instance.
critical_code_review_comments: EditableText does not appear to forward data-testid (or generic data-* attrs). Adding a passthrough makes future test-id wiring much cheaper.
ExplodeText spacer being empty is a real a11y/copy-paste regression (not just a test-id miss). Screen readers will read 'STOPWATCHING' as one token. Fix is the same as the textContent fix.
Hero ChipScroll pinning makes the page ~13000px tall — verify reduced-motion users get an OK fallback (the wandering spotlight + cosmic gradient should respect prefers-reduced-motion).
Two THREE.js copies imported; consolidate to avoid silent drift between Spline runtime and GalaxyBackground.
test_credentials: admin / kaizokuoniwa (verified working at POST /api/admin/login and GET /api/admin/session)
context_for_next_testing_agent: When E1 fixes the two issues, retest just: (1) await page.evaluate on [data-testid='explode-text'] textContent equals 'Stop watching. Start earning.'; (2) [data-testid='whats-included-eyebrow'] and -se exist + getComputedStyle().webkitBackgroundClip === 'text' + color is rgba(0,0,0,0). All other flows (admin login, 62 editable IDs, emotion-chip cycling, cosmic background, liquid particles, Spline blend mode, canvas, pull-quote, mobile/tablet) are confirmed passing — no need to re-run unless ExplodeText/EditableText changes break adjacent behavior.

explode_text_no_spaces.root_cause: ExplodeText.tsx renders the inter-word gap as <span style={{display:'inline-block',width:'0.32em',letterSpacing:'0'}} aria-hidden /> — i.e. an empty element. Visual width is preserved by CSS, but textContent/innerText concatenate without any space character.
explode_text_no_spaces.reproduction: Visit /exclusive-mentorships, scroll to bottom CTA, evaluate document.querySelector("[data-testid='explode-text']").textContent → 'Stopwatching.Startearning.'
explode_text_no_spaces.mitigation: Insert a literal space (or non-breaking space U+00A0) inside the spacer span. letterSpacing:'0' on the spacer already neutralizes the editorial-display -0.045em tracking so the visual gap won't collapse.

missing_eyebrow_testids.root_cause: Page wires the eyebrows via <EditableText id=… /> with class 'gradient-eyebrow' but does not pass data-testid. EditableText (lib/edit-context.tsx) likely doesn't accept/forward arbitrary data-* props either.
missing_eyebrow_testids.mitigation: Either add data-testid prop forwarding to EditableText, or wrap the EditableText in a <span data-testid='…'> at both call sites in /app/app/exclusive-mentorships/page.tsx.
